message:
fix: migrate legacy AGENT_CLI_PINNED on per-dimension unpin

When AGENT_CLI_PINNED=true (pins both cli+model) and user unpins
only one dimension, migrate the other to its specific flag.
e.g. unpin model → remove AGENT_CLI_PINNED, add AGENT_PIN_CLI.
Previously unpinning either dimension cleared the legacy flag
and unpinned both.

Signed-off-by: Andrew Anderson <andy@clubanderson.com>
